Description: Dynamic anomaly-based battlefield with changing events and selectable perks
PvE mode with AI enemies, fixed loadouts, and ticket entry system
Ranked 5-team competition based on loot value with visible enemy gear
Event mode with multiple bosses, stronger guards, and high-tier loot
3D spatial voice chat based on player distance and location
New assault rifle added in Season 5
Smoke grenade deployed when downed to aid survival
Adjusted high-tier ammo balance for fairness
Updated armor system for improved combat balance
New system allowing rare crafted or generated items
Easier access to protected storage containers
General performance improvements and bug fixes
Free skins, Koen, and currency rewards
Streaming rewards and creator event incentives
